inputs.label: Current Parameter Value
inputs.businessContext: Measured current value of the parameter to be adjusted (e.g., pressure, speed, temperature).

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured current value of the parameter to be adjusted (e.g., pressure, speed, temperature).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ayarlanacak parametrenin ölçülen mevcut değeri (örneğin, basınç, hız, sıcaklık).

inputs.label: Target Value
inputs.businessContext: Desired target value for the parameter after adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired target value for the parameter after adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ayarlama sonrası parametre için istenen hedef değer.

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Current process efficiency affecting the parameter response (0-100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current process efficiency affecting the parameter response (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parametre yanıtını etkileyen mevcut proses verimliliği (0-100).

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor applied to the adjustment to prevent overshoot (typically >=100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety factor applied to the adjustment to prevent overshoot (typically >=100).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aşmayı önlemek için ayarlamaya uygulanan güvenlik faktörü (tipik olarak >=100).

inputs.label: Adjustment Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible tweak percentage variation before issuing a warning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum permissible tweak percentage variation before issuing a warning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uyarı vermeden önce izin verilen maksimum ince ayar yüzdesi değişimi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
